sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Betlen khua neu mite nolah ihsip ta maw
Hong gum Zeisu hong suak hi lo maw
Tuucing te'n zong nuamin hong bia uh
Leimi tading hong ki pia nau ngek

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tuzan kim lai a lungdam huai bel thu
Hong gum ding Khazih Zeisu naungek
Minthang hen mitung nopna om hen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kong it lawm aw tuni'n nang sung mun a awng maw
Hong gum Zeisu naungek suaknuam hi
Bawng kuang sung lo mundang awnglo maw
Na lungsungah tuni'n suak sak in

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A lamdang aksipi'n mipilte lamhilh hi
Kham leh paaknamtui tawh bia uh hi
Kiniamkhiat a hong suak To Zeisu
Lungdamin eizong va bia ve ni
